goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'birmingham new street' and should 'arrive by 17:00'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'monday'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'the cambridge chop house'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '3 people' at '20:30' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from birmingham new street and should arrive by 17:00
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on monday
Make sure you get price and departure time
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called the cambridge chop house
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 20:30 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
